parameters.value: "  {" & newline & "    ""appID"": """ & PlaygamaBridge.PlatformAllGamesPropertyValue(loopindex("games"), "appID") & """," & newline & "    ""title"": """ & PlaygamaBridge.PlatformAllGamesPropertyValue(loopindex("games"), "title") & """," & newline & "    ""url"": """ & PlaygamaBridge.PlatformAllGamesPropertyValue(loopindex("games"), "url") & """," & newline & "    ""coverURL"": """ & PlaygamaBridge.PlatformAllGamesPropertyValue(loopindex("games"), "coverURL") & """," & newline & "    ""iconURL"": """ & PlaygamaBridge.PlatformAllGamesPropertyValue(loopindex("games"), "iconURL") & """" & newline & "  }" & (loopindex("games") < PlaygamaBridge.PlatformAllGamesCount - 1 ? "," : "") & newline

parameters.text: "{" & newline & "  ""appID"": """ & PlaygamaBridge.PlatformGameByIdPropertyValue("appID") & """," & newline & "  ""title"": """ & PlaygamaBridge.PlatformGameByIdPropertyValue("title") & """," & newline & "  ""url"": """ & PlaygamaBridge.PlatformGameByIdPropertyValue("url") & """," & newline & "  ""coverURL"": """ & PlaygamaBridge.PlatformGameByIdPropertyValue("coverURL") & """," & newline & "  ""iconURL"": """ & PlaygamaBridge.PlatformGameByIdPropertyValue("iconURL") & """," & newline & "  ""isAvailable"": " & PlaygamaBridge.PlatformGameByIdPropertyValue("isAvailable") & newline & "}"

children.name: isLocalStorage
children.comment: true mean internal storage, false mean platform storage

parameters.value: "  {" & newline & "    ""id"": """ & PlaygamaBridge.LeaderboardEntryId(LoopIndex) & """," & newline & "    ""name"": """ & PlaygamaBridge.LeaderboardEntryName(LoopIndex) & """," & newline & "    ""photo"": """ & PlaygamaBridge.LeaderboardEntryPhoto(LoopIndex) & """," & newline & "    ""score"": " & PlaygamaBridge.LeaderboardEntryScore(LoopIndex) & "," & newline & "    ""rank"": " & PlaygamaBridge.LeaderboardEntryRank(LoopIndex) & newline & "  }" & (LoopIndex < PlaygamaBridge.LeaderboardEntriesCount - 1 ? "," : "") & newline
